title: Remove admin token gate for public shareable URL access

requirements.text: Remove the admin token gate from the frontend so the app is fully publicly accessible without requiring a `caffeineAdminToken` URL fragment. The app should load normally for any visitor at the clean URL (e.g., `https://ip-global-terminal-2sw.caffeine.xyz/`) without checking for or redirecting based on any token.

quotes: it still requires an admin token can we make it so that it just a shareable URL
remove the admin token gate so the app is publicly accessible via a clean shareable URL — no token required

acceptanceCriteria: Visiting the app URL without any `#caffeineAdminToken=...` fragment loads the app normally with no authentication prompt or token check.
The `urlParams.ts` utility no longer reads, persists, or validates any `caffeineAdminToken` parameter.
No component in the app renders a token gate, token prompt, or access-denied state based on a missing admin token.
All four public routes (Home, Register IP, IP Database, Whitepaper) are accessible without any token in the URL.

constraints: Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui.
Do not add any new authentication or access control mechanisms.
nonGoals: Adding Internet Identity login or user authentication flows.
Modifying any IP record registration or querying functionality.
